steps.title: Solve for C
steps.content: Starting with $V_T = \frac{V_S}{1-C}$, multiply both sides by $(1-C)$: $$V_T(1-C) = V_S$$ $$V_T - V_T C = V_S$$ $$V_T C = V_T - V_S$$ $$C = \frac{V_T - V_S}{V_T} = 1 - \frac{V_S}{V_T}$$

steps.title: Evaluate Each Choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — $C = 1 - \frac{V_S}{V_T}$: Matches our derived result exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — $C = \frac{V_T}{V_S}$: This is the reciprocal of $V_S/V_T$, not what we derived. ✗
  • Choice C — $C = 1 + \frac{V_T}{V_S}$: Sign and ratio direction are both wrong. ✗
  • Choice D — $C = V_T - V_S$: Dimensionally wrong; C must be a unitless fraction between 0 and 1. ✗
That is the correct answer.
